dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} struck our settlement and dragged off several people. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} being held at {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to act quickly, before {quest_time_pressure}. {quest_ally} spotted the {enemy_type} guarding the area {location_hint}. Cut through every one of them standing between us and the captives.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every moment we wait, those people suffer. Kill anything that moves in that camp: they showed us no mercy either.

dialogueChunks.intro: Since {quest_origin}, {player_name}, {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_has} been trapped inside {quest_focus_the}. We can hear them calling out, but the path is blocked.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} have been drawn to the site and are lurking {location_hint}. They stand between us and the people trapped inside. Clear out every last one of them so we can reach the survivors.
dialogueChunks.outro: Time is running out down there. Slay the {enemy_type} and open the way, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_focus_the} {quest_focus_has} been surrounded by {quest_threat_the} for days. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} running low on supplies and cannot hold much longer.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} are dug in {location_hint}, and they are tightening the noose. Someone needs to break the siege from the outside: destroy their patrols and scatter their ranks.
dialogueChunks.outro: Save them, and you will have access to {quest_reward_hint} and the gratitude of every soul inside those walls.

dialogueChunks.intro: Something terrible happened, {player_name}. People are gone: taken while the settlement slept. The guards found signs of a struggle and tracks leading {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We counted the missing at dawn. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} in the hands of {quest_threat_the}. The {enemy_type} left drag marks and broken doors, but they moved fast. Whoever organized this knew exactly where to strike.
dialogueChunks.outro: Follow those tracks and kill every captor you find, before {quest_time_pressure}. They have a head start, but they are moving slow with prisoners. Cut them down before they reach safety.

dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} received a message two days ago: an urgent summons to meet someone {location_hint}. They left at once. They never arrived.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The message was a forgery. {quest_ally} confirmed it matches none of our couriers. Someone lured {target_npc} out deliberately, and the {enemy_type} were spotted in that direction days before.
dialogueChunks.outro: We fear the worst, but there is still hope. Find {target_npc} and talk to them: they may know who is behind this and where the others are being held.

dialogueChunks.intro: A ransom note was pinned to the gate this morning. The {enemy_type} have taken {quest_focus_the} and are demanding {quest_item} in exchange. The deadline is soon.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We cannot pay what they ask: we barely have enough to survive the season. But if we refuse, they have promised to make an example. {quest_ally} thinks their camp is somewhere {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Forget negotiation: strike their camp and slaughter every last one of them, before {quest_time_pressure}. {player_name}, can we count on you?
